name: Everybody's Favorite Carrot-Peanut Butter Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x3x2" loaf pan.
3. Cream together sugar, peanut butter, peanut oil, and eggs; add carrots and vanilla extract. Blend flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, allspice, and nutmeg. Alternately add flour mixture and milk to the creamed mixture. Turn into prepared pan and bake in preheated oven for 70 minutes.
4. Cool 10 minutes in pan, remove from pan, and cool on rack.
